name: Glorified Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's Cream of Celery Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Brown half of the pork chops for 10 minutes or until browned, turning occasionally. Remove and set aside.
2. Repeat with the remaining pork chops. Once all are cooked, spoon off any excess fat from the skillet.
3. Add the cream of celery soup and water to the skillet. Bring to a boil.
4. Return the pork chops to the skillet. Cover and cook over low heat for 10 minutes or until the chops are no longer pink, stirring occasionally.
5. Serve the pork chops over rice.
